financial_metrics.title: Financial Metrics
financial_metrics.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing really well because it's making a lot of money from new technology services.
They are smartly investing in areas that keep their profits high and cash flow steady.

risk_intelligence.title: Risk Intelligence
risk_intelligence.label: Low Risk
bullets: The company faces challenges in keeping profits steady due to ongoing investments and changing market conditions.
They are investing heavily in new technology, which could be risky but might lead to big rewards in the future.

esg.title: ESG Analysis
esg.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well in caring for people and communities.
They have strong leadership and decision-making practices in place.

speaker_sentiment.title: Speaker Sentiment
speaker_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company's leaders spoke with a lot of confidence about their plans and financial health.
They believe their past success and new AI strategies will help them grow, even if some experts have doubts.

qa_transparency.title: Q&A Transparency
qa_transparency.label: Average
bullets: The company shared some plans but didn't give enough details or timelines.
They answered some questions clearly, but others were left unclear without numbers to support them.

overall_sentiment.title: Overall Sentiment
overall_sentiment.label: Excellent
bullets: The company is doing well and is expected to grow because of smart investments and confident leadership.
Even though there are some challenges, the company's strong financial health suggests it can handle them and continue to succeed.

investment_synthesis.title: Investment Synthesis
investment_synthesis.label: Good
bullets: The company is doing well financially and is better than many others in its field.
They are investing in new technology, which could help them grow but might cost more money now.
